selection.bam_landmark_note: BAM has no place=* object in OSM; the northern outer cluster nearest 'Бамовское озеро' represents it. Confirm with the owner.
selection.method: Food-service POIs (amenity=restaurant/fast_food/cafe/bar/pub plus takeaway/delivery venues) were read from the LOCAL Bender extract and single-link clustered at 600 m. The largest cluster is the central origin; remaining clusters with >= 3 POIs represent BAM and other outer Bender districts.
selection.source: local Geofabrik Moldova extract (no Nominatim, no Overpass)
selection.villages_excluded: Villages are NOT restaurant origins: too little actual restaurant evidence in the local extract.
selection.why_representative: OSM venue coverage is incomplete, so clusters are used as representative origins instead of treating each POI as complete truth.
